Performance Evaluation Guideline
Evaluation Ratings
Exemplary (5): The employee delivers extraordinary accomplishments in their role. Their contributions made an outstanding impact on the achievement of M.C. Dean and customer objectives. Employee exhibits a high level of mastery and contribution in all dimensions of role. Serves as an inspirational role model for behaviors consistent with M.C. Deans mission and values.

Exceeds expectations (4): The employee consistently exceeds established expectations for their role. They exceed expectations in all dimensions of the work performed, making a significant contribution in support of M.C. Dean and customer objectives. Sets an excellent example of behaviors consistent with M.C. Deans mission and values.

Achieves expectations (3): The employee achieves all established expectations for their role. Their performance is fully representative of the achievement of M.C. Dean and customer objectives. Behavior reflects M.C. Deans mission and values.

Needs improvement (2): The employee's performance is below established expectations for their role. Behavior may not reflect M.C. Deans mission and values. Improvement is necessary and expected.

Below Expectations (1): The employee does not meet minimum established expectations in the role. Behavior may not reflect M.C. Deans mission and values. A professional development plan to correct performance, including timelines, should be outlined and monitored to measure progress. Significant, immediate improvement is required.
